# teams config set-lang

Default language for project creation (typescript, csharp, python)

## Usage

```
teams config set-lang [language] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `language` | Set to typescript (ts), csharp (cs), or python (py). Omit to show current value or pick interactively. | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
